titleStmt.title: SII 28.158: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 158. (A.R. No. 313 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Records the royal order taking note of and approving the setting up of a flower garden after his own name as Śrī-Patañjali-dēvaṉ and grant of 5 mā of cultivated land and 1/2 mā of kitchen garden-land (kollai-nilam) for the support (ilakkai and koṟṟu) of 4 persons attached to the garden by Araiyaṉ Śrī-Patañjalidēvaṉ alias Kāḍuveṭṭi, the uḍaiyāṉ of Kiḷiyūr in Āvūr-kūṟṟam in Nittavinōdavaḷanāḍu and permitting the record to be inscribed in the tirumāḷigai of Āḷuḍaiyārkōyil. The flower garden was to be raised by 2(1/2) persons (āḷuḍaiyāṉ) and 1(1/2) persons (āḷavandāṉ) were to supervise. The flowers to be contributed was also specified.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ maturaiyuṅ karuvūrum Īḻamum pāṇṭiyaṉai muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷi vicaiyā Apiṣekamum virar Apiṣekamum paṇṇi Aruḷiṉa tiripuvaṉaviratevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10� Āvatu 100
5 10§ ṉāl toṇṭaimāṉum tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyāṉum maturāntaka brahmārāyaṉum Āḷuṭaiyār koyilukkuc cāmutāyattirumāḷikaikkūṟu tillai Ampalappallavaraiyaṉum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum cāmutāyañ ceyvā
rkaḷum koyil nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum ceyyat tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi nitta viṉotavaḷanāṭṭu Āvūr kūṟṟattu kiḷiyūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ śrīpatañcalitevaṉāṉa kāṭu
veṭṭi ceyvitta rājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭup poṉmenta coḻapurattu poṉmontaperumāḷ tirunantavaṉattukku vaṭakku ceṇṭu veḷikku teṟkku naṭuvuḷpaṭṭa rūpāy ttile Āḷuṭaiyārkku śrīpatañcali tevaṉe
ṉṉum perāl Oru tirunantavaṉañ ceytu Ittirunantavaṉattil ṇṭu kaḷ Iruvācciyum yum mallikaiyum nantiyāvattamum Ākki Āḷuṭaiyāṉ per Iraṇṭaraiyum Āḷavantāṉ per O
ṉṟaraiyum Ākap per nālvaṟkku Āḷ Oṉṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Āḷukku māṭṭu nāḻiyuriyum Āḷ Oṉṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Aḷakkum Iruvācci muṉṉāḻiyum Āḷ Iraṇṭukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Aḷakkum mallikaiyum nantiyā
vattamum mukkuṟuṇiyumāka Āḷ nālukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Aḷakkum tiruppaḷḷittāmam mukkuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyuriyum nāḷtoṟum Aḷakkavum Aḷavātu cikaippaṭṭatuṇṭākil peraḷavākak koḻuntum peruñceṇpakamum
veruntāḻaiyum Uḷḷiṭṭaṉa Iṭṭuc celavākkāte Aḷakka niccayitta vaṟkattile tiruppūmaṇṭapattile Aḷantu cilavākkakkaṭavatākavum Ivarkaḷukku Ilakkaikkum koṟṟukkum per Oṉṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukkuk kuṟuṇi
nāṉāḻiyāka vanta nellukku Iṉṉāṭṭu Irācacūriyaccaruppeti maṅkalattup piṭākai tillaivāḻantaṇanallūril viḷai nilattile Aiñcumā nilamum kollai nilattile Araimā nilamum vilaikoṇṭu Iṉṉilattu Iṟai mikitiyāl
Uḷḷa nellum peṟakkaṭavarkaḷāka Iṉṉilam Ivarkaḷukku viṭṭāṉeṉṟum Ippaṭi Āḷuṭaiyār koyiṟ tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭakkaṭavatākap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu toṇṭaimāṉtāṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭa
vatākaccoṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyyappaṇṇuvatu Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraolai Irācentiraciṅkamuventaveḷāṉ Ippaṭi tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉār Ivai villavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai viḻiñattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Aṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu I
vai cittarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vāṇādhirājan Eḻuttu Ivai toṇṭaimāṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 28.158 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
